listSelection.title: Hm? Who might you be? Oh, you've heard about my forging skills? In that case, I'd be glad to process some of your ores... for a fee.
So, what kind of mineral ore would you like to refine?
So, what kind of jewel ore would you like to refine?
A rare jewel? Which one were you thinking of?
Crystal ore? It's hard to find those around here...

choices.text: Make Processed Wood with Tree Branch

listSelection.title: Materials? I know of a few materials that I can make for you...
Arrows? Not a problem at all.

askNumber.text: So, you want me to make some #t{context.item}#s? In that case, how many do you want me to make?
So, you want me to make some #t4011007#s? In that case, how many do you want me to make?
So, you want me to make some #t4021009#s? In that case, how many do you want me to make?
So, you want me to make some #t4003000#s? In that case, how many do you want me to make?
